Graphic Designer Job at Propolis Solution Limited




        
    

        
        Propolis Solution Limited is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphic Designer

Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Contract

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Must be proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, illustrator, InDesign) CorelDRAW & Canva.
	Ability to collaborate with teams to deliver high-quality creative assets
	Strong portfolio demonstrating versatility.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Front Office Manager Job at Hilton Worldwide




        
    

        
        Hilton is the leading global hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full-service hotels and resorts to extended-stay suites and mid-priced hotels. For nearly a century, Hilton has offered business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Hilton is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences across its global brands. Our vision to fill the earth with the light and warmth of hospitality unites us as a team to create remarkable hospitality experiences around the world every day. And our amazing Team Members are at the heart of it all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Office Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HSE Supervisor",
  "description": "Trucrete Solutions Limited is dynamic Construction Management firm with expertise in Infrastructural Development, Engineering Services, Procurement, Facility Management, and General Contracting. With several groundbreaking engineering projects in our portfolio over the years, Trucrete is proud to have been involved in shaping Nigeria by elevating critical infrastructure to international standards, erecting buildings, bridges, flyovers and roads in key strategic locations in Nigeria. We have helped create a safer and more pleasant environment, all while encouraging state growth and development.

Our fleet of plant machinery and equipment gives us the capacity to successfully undertake multiple projects in various parts of Nigeria at any one time, while our network of tried and tested subcontractors and suppliers throughout the country and globally, enables us to procure the best resources for every project.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Supervisor

Job Locations: Osun

About the Role


	We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced HSE Supervisor to join our team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in health, safety, and environmental supervision within the construction of roads, with proven expertise in traffic management and ensuring compliance with safety standards on large-scale infrastructure projects.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, implement, and monitor HSE policies, procedures, and programs across project sites.
	Conduct regular site inspections and risk assessments to ensure compliance with local and international safety standards.
	Oversee and manage traffic safety operations within and around construction zones.
	Deliver HSE inductions, toolbox talks, and training sessions for site personnel.
	Investigate incidents and near misses, ensuring timely reporting and implementation of corrective actions.
	Liaise with project management and regulatory authorities on all HSE-related matters.
	Promote a strong safety culture and continuous improvement in workplace safety practices.


Requirements


	Relevant HSE certifications (e.g., NEBOSH, IOSH, ISPON, or equivalent).
	Minimum of 8 years of experience in HSE supervision within the construction sector.
	Demonstrated experience in traffic management and control on active road construction sites.
	Strong knowledge of local and international HSE regulations and best practices.
	Excellent communication, leadership, and reporting skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and relevant certifications to: trucretecareers@trucreteng.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  },

HSE Supervisor Job at Trucrete Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Trucrete Solutions Limited is dynamic Construction Management firm with expertise in Infrastructural Development, Engineering Services, Procurement, Facility Management, and General Contracting. With several groundbreaking engineering projects in our portfolio over the years, Trucrete is proud to have been involved in shaping Nigeria by elevating critical infrastructure to international standards, erecting buildings, bridges, flyovers and roads in key strategic locations in Nigeria. We have helped create a safer and more pleasant environment, all while encouraging state growth and development.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Our fleet of plant machinery and equipment gives us the capacity to successfully undertake multiple projects in various parts of Nigeria at any one time, while our network of tried and tested subcontractors and suppliers throughout the country and globally, enables us to procure the best resources for every project.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Supervisor

Job Locations: Osun

About the Role


	We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced HSE Supervisor to join our team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in health, safety, and environmental supervision within the construction of roads, with proven expertise in traffic management and ensuring compliance with safety standards on large-scale infrastructure projects.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, implement, and monitor HSE policies, procedures, and programs across project sites.
	Conduct regular site inspections and risk assessments to ensure compliance with local and international safety standards.
	Oversee and manage traffic safety operations within and around construction zones.
	Deliver HSE inductions, toolbox talks, and training sessions for site personnel.
	Investigate incidents and near misses, ensuring timely reporting and implementation of corrective actions.
	Liaise with project management and regulatory authorities on all HSE-related matters.
	Promote a strong safety culture and continuous improvement in workplace safety practices.


Requirements


	Relevant HSE certifications (e.g., NEBOSH, IOSH, ISPON, or equivalent).
	Minimum of 8 years of experience in HSE supervision within the construction sector.
	Demonstrated experience in traffic management and control on active road construction sites.
	Strong knowledge of local and international HSE regulations and best practices.
	Excellent communication, leadership, and reporting skills.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and relevant certifications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
